key_findings: All methods have 0.000% Risk of Ruin (except ATR Scaling which broke)
Kelly 50% maximizes geometric growth (CAGR=2004%) with DD<1%
Kelly 25% is institutional sweet spot (CAGR=359%, DD=0.49%)
Kelly 10% is ultra-conservative for prop firms (CAGR=84%, DD=0.20%)
Fixed 1.00% has excessive DD (12.49%) — NOT recommended
Risk Parity provides near-zero risk fallback (DD=0.07%)
ATR Scaling failed (negative CAGR) — position sizes too variable
